prompt: Given a disk with 150 tracks (0-149), head at track 80 moving towards increasing numbers. Requests are in tracks of 20, 45, 10, 120, 130, 5, 90. What is the service order using SCAN and C-SCAN algorithms?
reference_answer:
a. SCAN: 90, 120, 130, 45, 20, 10, 5. (Moves to the end, then reverses).
b. C-SCAN: 90, 120, 130, 5, 10, 20, 45. (Moves to the end, jumps to the start, then continues).
